focus_points.label: Celebrating the payments refactor success
focus_points.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor on Monday — big win, team noticed. Worth ensuring Priya feels her contributions are recognized and celebrated.

focus_points.label: Checking in on energy levels this week
focus_points.reason: Looks a bit flat this week, quieter than usual in standup. Could be post-launch fatigue or something else — worth exploring.

focus_points.label: Interest in mentoring opportunities
focus_points.reason: Mentioned in passing they'd like to do more mentoring; we haven't talked about that in a few months. Worth discussing how to integrate mentoring into her role.

focus_points.label: Upcoming involvement in the billing rewrite
focus_points.reason: Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite, which they haven't heard about yet. Important to align on upcoming priorities and expectations.

focus_points.label: Support needed for upcoming projects
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — selected because this is a normal Bi-weekly check-in topic for a Senior Senior Backend Engineer. Ensures Priya feels supported as projects evolve.
